title: gilia leptomeria subsp. micromeria
intro: Gilia leptomeria subsp. micromeria is a subspecies of the Gilia leptomeria plant, a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gilia leptomeria subsp. micromeria include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves and ointments to treat skin issues and wounds.
